title: Optimized For Controllers
description: probably the best modded controller experience with over 200+ mods that add bosses, weapons, armor, biomes, and much more
body:
### well optimized modpack meant for controller that runs on my macbook at 100fps with full settings BUT 8 RENDER DISTANCE *no promises past that

added bosses, weapons, armor, biomes, and more

200+ mods

### below are disclaimers and other important-ish information, if you have issues with the pack i mightve mentioned them below but you dont need to read it all

shaders ARE supported! the mod [Chunks fade in](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in) is beautiful for low render distances and i use it for my mac (shaders do horrible things to my mac), but when using shaders, make sure to disable it (this can be done in-game, click on the cube next to video settings and simply change ```Fade enabled:``` to ```NO```). this should clear any graphical glitches you may experiance when loading chunks

PC PLAYERS!!! i cant speak for all but my pc wouldnt register any controller imputs. i had to force not use native library and build the binds from scratch (took less than 5 minutes). if you need help join the discord and i'll be happy to assist. **I wont say this is fixed but ive uninstalled and reinstalled this pack a bunch and the problem isnt as prevalent after the 2.0 update**

**the correct version of Nvidium is in the pack but disabled, just enable it if you have an NVIDIA card.** ~~[Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) IS recommended for people with NVIDIA cards (i got a 3060). i tried it and found decent boost in fps ([0.2.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium/version/0.2.5-beta) is the latest version that will work with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) version [0.5.3](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/version/mc1.20.1-0.5.3))~~

it has [ESSENTIAL mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) but mac doesnt like voice chat (mic permissions) so if you want proximity to play with your friends, enable it in the pack ([interactions](https://modrinth.com/mod/voice-chat-interaction) recommended for fun stuff like deep dark)

[Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) wheel uses your keyboard keybinds (sorta), so make sure to clear any conflicts you may have (for example i set ```x``` for rolling on controller. the deafult keybind for rolling is ```r```, which is shared with a few mods; so whenever ```x``` is pressed, all my binds associated with ```r``` are triggered)

i linked a VERY work in progress (since its just me in it for now lol) discord just in case players who like the pack find bugs, have questions, or make suggestions for/about the pack (or just meet other players wanting to start a world)

i would be open to working on a questing system (with [Heracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/heracles)) to help players along the pack and to hit all the cool bosses

please upload any screenshots you think are cool in ```#for-gallery``` if you catch any while using the pack!

i dont have any ways to support me as im just a mod compilier so if you end up liking any mods in this pack please check out the original creators and support them however you can

_[get more emotes here](https://emotes.kosmx.dev/emotes)_

yes those are hotdogs
